calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:25am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeals, Respondent Jim Martingale appears in Pro Per (Ana R. Gonzales-Martingale is not present but has signed a declaration waiving her appearance); Appellant Ayman Shedadeh is present and represented by Paul Arshawsky. Appearing as a witness for Mr. Gonzalez-Martingale is Alicia Gamez; appearing as witnesses for Mr. Shehadeh are Carlos Gueza and Edward Dougherty. Parties and counsel testify in the narrative. New evidence is introduced but not marked or indentified. (The Court and parties view a video tape of the residence in question but the tape was not retained by the Court.)
11:30am
The parties make closing remarks and the matter is submitted. Evidence returned to parties.
